framework.name: Use-Case Charter Pre-Gate
framework.description: One-page document signed by business owner, data lead, and executive sponsor before any technical work. Forces four questions: specific problem, baseline metric, target KPI, data dependencies/risk gates.
framework.raw_quote: A one-page use-case charter signed by the business owner, data team lead, and executive sponsor. The charter forces four questions before any technical work starts.

source.title: Why 95% of AI Projects Fail and How Data Fixes It - SR analytics
